entry.title: New: BILL011(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO ELECTRONIC AMUSEMENT DEVICES.

Creates a regulatory system of permits for the display and use of electronic amusement devices. Designates the Chief of Police of the HPD, or the chief's designee, as the official responsible for the issuance of the electronic amusement device permits. Provides the Chief of Police of the HPD with rulemaking authority. Establishes penalties for non-compliance.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
